title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements to Looker that integrate Gemini AI and dashboard agents to automate business intelligence workflows. The update emphasizes a governed semantic layer for grounding AI in trusted data, with new features including conversational analytics and pre-trained agents for scaling expertise.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through new Looker capabilities that bring Gemini AI and dashboard agents into business intelligence workflows. The central idea is a governed semantic layer that grounds AI in trusted data, addressing the reliability problem that limits agentic analytics. Key additions include conversational analytics and pre-trained agents meant to scale analytical expertise to business users.
